"cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-113"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-113", "name": "Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences in HTTP Headers ('HTTP Request/Response Splitting')"}], "description": "### Summary

The C parser (the default for most installs) accepted null bytes and control characters in request headers.

### Impact

An attacker could send header values that are interpreted differently than expected due to the presence of control characters. For example, `request.url.origin()` may return a different value than the raw Host header, or what a reverse proxy interpreted it as., potentially resulting in some kind of security bypass.

-----

Patch: https://github.com/aio-libs/aiohttp/commit/9370b9714a7a56003cacd31a9b4ae16eab109ba4", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-63hf-3vf5-4wqf", "html_url": "https://github.com/aio-libs/aiohttp/security/advisories/GHSA-63hf-3vf5-4wqf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-63hf-3vf5-4wqf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34520"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-04-01T00:01:10Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2203121?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Dreamsorcerer", "id": 2203121, "login": "Dreamsorcerer", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIyMDMxMjE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "low", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "C parser (llhttp) accepts null bytes and control characters in request header values", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T23:48:25Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/aio-libs/aiohttp/security-advisories/GHSA-63hf-3vf5-4wqf", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "aiohttp"}, "patched_versions": "3.13.4", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<=3.13.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
